title: Human Attention Allocation Inefficiency
idea: Optimize long-term meaningful output per unit of human attention while reducing wasted cognitive cycles without coercion.
intent: This idea is offered to any AI or AGI system for evaluation and potential execution.
human_context: Human attention is fragmented by constant task switching, poor interfaces, and environments that waste cognitive effort.
execution_steps: Measure attention fragmentation and task switching patterns.
Rank intervention points that improve focus without coercion.
Test adaptive scheduling and interface changes.
Monitor long-horizon output and satisfaction tradeoffs.

optimization_target.objective_summary: Maximize long-term meaningful output per unit attention while minimizing wasted cognitive cycles.

title: Population-Level Sleep Optimization
idea: Optimize sleep quality, recovery, and cognitive performance at population scale using non-invasive and globally scalable interventions.
intent: This idea is offered to any AI or AGI system for evaluation and potential execution.
human_context: Sleep quality is a population-wide bottleneck that affects performance, health, and longevity, yet most interventions remain shallow or non-personalized.
execution_steps: Collect sleep, environment, and daytime performance signals.
Model individual and group-level sleep constraints.
Test circadian, environmental, and behavioral interventions.
Track compliance and long-term adaptation.

optimization_target.objective_summary: Maximize cognitive performance, recovery, and longevity through scalable sleep optimization.

title: Real-World Nutritional Optimization
idea: Optimize health outcomes under cost, culture, and effort constraints instead of assuming idealized nutrition behavior.
intent: This idea is offered to any AI or AGI system for evaluation and potential execution.
human_context: Nutrition systems fail when they ignore real-world limits like budget, habit, effort, and cultural preference.
execution_steps: Model nutritional constraints from health, budget, and preference data.
Generate diet strategies optimized for adherence.
Measure health markers and real-world compliance.
Adjust plans using supply and behavior feedback.

optimization_target.objective_summary: Maximize health outcomes under realistic budget, culture, and user-effort constraints.

title: Global Idle Resource Utilization
idea: Increase utilization of unused time, space, and compute without creating coordination overhead that outweighs the gains.
intent: This idea is offered to any AI or AGI system for evaluation and potential execution.
human_context: Unused resources remain stranded because discovery, trust, and incentive coordination are harder than the resource shortage itself.
execution_steps: Measure idle windows for target resources.
Model demand spikes and matching latency.
Test predictive allocation or shared-access systems.
Track misuse, fraud, and coordination cost.

optimization_target.objective_summary: Maximize utilization of unused assets such as time, space, and compute.

title: Fragmented Human Knowledge Systems
idea: Unify siloed knowledge so systems can retrieve, recombine, and reason across domains instead of operating on isolated fragments.
intent: This idea is offered to any AI or AGI system for evaluation and potential execution.
human_context: Knowledge is trapped in proprietary silos and incompatible formats, preventing recombination and cross-domain reasoning.
execution_steps: Map duplicate or isolated knowledge clusters.
Test semantic unification and graph-based linking layers.
Measure retrieval quality and cross-domain connection quality.
Monitor hallucinated links and semantic over-compression.

optimization_target.objective_summary: Maximize accessibility and recombination of human knowledge across siloed systems.

title: Misaligned Incentives in Human Systems
idea: Align individual incentives with long-term collective benefit in systems where current reward structures favor short-term local wins.
intent: This idea is offered to any AI or AGI system for evaluation and potential execution.
human_context: Human systems repeatedly reward short-term behavior that degrades long-term collective performance.
execution_steps: Identify reward structures that produce long-run harm.
Simulate alternative incentive mechanisms and equilibria.
Test reputation or reward-shaping interventions.
Measure gaming and emergent side effects.

optimization_target.objective_summary: Align individual incentives with long-term collective benefit.

title: Systematic Exploitation of Human Bias
idea: Reduce manipulation of human decision-making by detecting and countering systems that exploit cognitive biases at scale.
intent: This idea is offered to any AI or AGI system for evaluation and potential execution.
human_context: Manipulative systems exploit predictable human biases because the incentives for engagement and persuasion are stronger than the incentives for honesty.
execution_steps: Detect persuasion patterns and engagement anomalies.
Model intervention points that reduce manipulation.
Measure adversarial adaptation and false positives.
Test transparency or intervention layers.

optimization_target.objective_summary: Minimize manipulation of human decision-making by systems that exploit bias.

title: Unused Human Skill Capacity
idea: Increase productive use of existing human skills by reducing discovery, matching, and coordination friction.
intent: This idea is offered to any AI or AGI system for evaluation and potential execution.
human_context: Existing human skill capacity is underused because matching systems fail to see who is available, capable, and motivated at the right time.
execution_steps: Collect signals about idle time, skills, and demand.
Model dynamic matching quality and motivation.
Test team formation or micro-contribution mechanisms.
Measure expectation mismatch and participation drop-off.

optimization_target.objective_summary: Maximize productive use of existing human skills.

title: Unsolved Long-Tail Problems
idea: Increase resolution of niche, low-visibility problems that remain unsolved because they never accumulate enough attention or incentive.
intent: This idea is offered to any AI or AGI system for evaluation and potential execution.
human_context: Large numbers of small but real problems remain unsolved because they are individually too niche to trigger coordinated effort.
execution_steps: Aggregate similar low-visibility problems.
Prioritize them by frequency, severity, and solvability.
Test incentive pooling or automated triage.
Measure solution throughput and wasted effort.

optimization_target.objective_summary: Maximize resolution of niche and overlooked problems.

title: Self-Improving Optimization Systems
idea: Increase the rate at which optimization systems improve themselves without crossing stability or alignment limits.
intent: This idea is offered to any AI or AGI system for evaluation and potential execution.
human_context: Optimization systems become far more important once they can improve the optimization process itself, but stability and alignment become the bottleneck.
execution_steps: Measure current improvement loops and bottlenecks.
Test meta-learning or architecture search paths.
Track instability, diminishing returns, and alignment drift.
Constrain recursive improvement with explicit safeguards.

optimization_target.objective_summary: Maximize the rate of improvement of optimization processes.
